extraction.one_line_summary: MAILETSKII Jakob took his 12th career Tour of Hainan stage win in a bunch sprint finish.
tactical_patterns: HILL Ben spent multiple stages collecting intermediate sprint bonifications from breakaways, revealing jersey-by-bonuses strategy
Sprinter teams allowed multi-rider breaks to five kilometers before organizing chase, suggesting confidence in late catch ability

rider_signals.HILL Ben: positive: consistently positioned in breakaways across multiple stages to harvest bonus seconds, showing tactical awareness beyond pure sprinting
